subcodes.first_line: ...The primary characteristic of true believers is trustworthiness whereas the primary characteristic of the rebellious is faithlessness
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول صفت اهل ایمان امانتست و اول صفت اهل طغیان خیانت
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution
